name: Reality Defender
description: Reality Defender — deepfake and synthetic media detection API for images, video, audio, and text.

seo.title: Reality Defender — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Reality Defender: Reality Defender — deepfake and synthetic media detection API for images, video, audio, and text.

when_to_use: Detecting deepfake images and videos via API
Scanning user-uploaded media for synthetic content before publication
Integrating deepfake detection into identity verification flows
Monitoring social media content for AI-generated misinformation

pros: Multimodal deepfake detection in one API
Covers images, video, audio, and text
Good traction with finance and media customers
Active research team, model updates matter here
cons: Deepfake arms race means constant accuracy churn
Not useful for standard UGC toxicity
False positives still a real issue
review.verdict: Leading deepfake detection API, but treat scores as signals not verdicts given the adversarial landscape.
review.best_for: Banks, insurers, newsrooms, and platforms facing synthetic media fraud and impersonation.
review.not_for: General moderation needs or teams expecting static, deterministic accuracy.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
